name: @aibender/testkit
description: Synthesized fixture generators + fake servers for tests (plan §9.5). Fixtures are ALWAYS synthesized, never copied from real transcripts [X2]. Surface: JSONL line generator, transcript-tail fixtures + FakeQueryRunner (ICR-0001), gateway FakeKernel (ICR-0002), golden WS-protocol fixture corpus (ICR-0003), FakePtyBackend + synthetic login TUI (ICR-0006), gateway port doubles (ICR-0007), mock OpenCode SSE server + fake LM Studio + fake opencode.db builder (ICR-0008), fake statusline stdin feed + fake OTLP emitter (ICR-0010).
